input.label: The base64-encoded auth token of the user who'll connect to JIRA

block.title: Splunk ID
block.text:
Find this value in the RealTime Splunk Connector for JSD on your JIRA Instance at
Administration > Applications > RealTime Splunk Connector for JSD > Splunk Servers > ... > View Splunk Details

block.title: JIRA Instance URL
block.text: For JIRA Cloud Users, this will be https://jsdsplunkplugin.plugins.forty8fifty.com/

block.title: JIRA Project Key
block.text: This will be shorthand for your JIRA Project. If your JIRA issues look like "MYPROJ-12345" the Project Key would be "MYPROJ"
